name: Radio & Podcasting
student_summary: Own the audio wave — RJing and the podcast boom.
overview: Own the audio wave — RJing and the podcast boom. Radio & Podcasting sits in the Media & News family of Communication, Marketing & Sales. It is a broad career direction — you can enter it through several routes and specialize later without restarting.
who_is_this_for: You are drawn to media & news and want a broad path you can shape
who_should_avoid: Intense competition drains you — entry here is a contest
daily_responsibilities: Apply voice craft to real problems
Collaborate with your team using show production
Keep improving at interviewing — the field keeps moving
Communicate progress, results and decisions to the people who depend on them
work_environment: Office or fully remote — laptop work with flexible location
problem_solving_style: Creative — explore, prototype, iterate on ideas
alternative_paths: Build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional
scope: Demand outlook in India is strong; see FAQs for how the platform keeps this current.
ai_impact: low — AI assists rather than replaces
advantages: A broad Media & News foundation that opens multiple specializations later
challenges: Fierce competition for the best seats and roles
Early years demand patience before the rewards compound
misconceptions: “You must pick your exact job title now.” Radio & Podcasting is a direction — specialization comes later.
“Only toppers make it.” Consistent skill-building beats one exam rank in the long run.
portfolio_ideas: A documented case study of show production
projects: Beginner: explore voice craft with a small self-chosen project
Intermediate: build or run something real using Mics
smaller_city_scope: Remote-friendly: smaller-city living with metro-level work is realistic.
rural_scope: Limited rural presence; expect to base yourself in a town or city.
home_state_note: Ask the AI coach about your state — regional demand, cities and relocation advice are generated live from retrieved data, never hardcoded.
transition_paths: Toward Broadcasting & Anchoring: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Content Creation & New Media: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
Toward Sound Engineering: build the shared skills and take a bridging project or course
faqs: What does Radio & Podcasting pay in India?
Entry roles typically start around ₹2 LPA and senior professionals reach ₹20 LPA or more. Live, region-specific salary data is retrieved by the platform when you ask.
What should I study after Class 12?
Focus on English, Any. Typical degrees: Mass Comm, Any degree + demo. Alternatives exist: build an audience/portfolio first — degrees optional.
Will AI take over this career?
AI impact is low — AI assists rather than replaces. Broad paths like Radio & Podcasting evolve rather than disappear — the students who pair domain skill with AI tools benefit most.
Is this a broad path or a specific job?
Radio & Podcasting is a career direction. Once inside it you can specialize further — the platform will map specializations in future versions.
